Bus Timings

E16 Bus Timings Sabkha Bus Station to Hatta Bus Station

October 6, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The E16 bus service in Dubai offers an extensive route connecting Sabkha Bus Station to Hatta Bus Station and vice versa.

Route Name E16
Route Description Sabkha Bus Station · 1 - Hatta Bus Station · 1
Total Distance Approximately 130 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 117 minutes / 1 hours 57 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 22:32 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 25 to AED 30
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus E16

Bus E16 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus E16 runs with the following schedule:

From Sabkha Bus Station From Hatta Bus Station
06:30 05:30
08:20 07:30
10:25 09:35
12:35 11:25
14:30 13:30
16:30 15:40
18:25 17:35
20:35 19:30
22:32 21:30

Bus E16 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for E16 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

Traveling on the E16 bus costs between AED 25 and AED 30, depending on the distance covered. This pricing structure provides an affordable option for passengers traveling between central Dubai and Hatta. For frequent travelers, the cost-effectiveness of the E16 makes it a practical choice for both daily commutes and occasional trips.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no specific online booking system for the E16 bus route. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates, schedules, and route information, the RTA Dubai app is a valuable tool. It helps passengers plan their journeys efficiently and stay informed about any service changes or delays.

Bus Route

The E16 bus route encompasses a broad range of stops, offering connectivity across significant locations:

  1. Sabkha Bus Station · 1

  2. Al Ras Metro

  3. Deira, Old Souq

  4. Emirates NBD

  5. Al Sabkha Marine

  6. Dubai Intercontinental Hotel

  7. British Council

  8. Oud Metha Metro · 1

  9. Oud Metha Road

  10. Oud Metha Road, 2

  11. Wafi City

  12. Wasl Club

  13. Emarat Petrol Station

  14. Aden Street

  15. Dragon Mart 2 External

  16. Civil Defence Training Centre

  17. Wadi Al Shabak Camp

  18. Awir, Terminus

  19. Awir, New Shabia

  20. Habab, Roundabout

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Habab, Reem Emarat Petrol

  2. Nazwa, Al Wista Supermarket

  3. Ramool Adventure Park

  4. Hatta Road Al Rifadah

  5. Al Madam, Roundabout

  6. DM Staff Accommodation

  7. Hatta Fort Hotel

  8. Emirates NBD

  9. Sheikh Khalifa Masjid

  10. Hatta Bus Station, 1

Bus E16 Station Overview

Sabkha Bus Station · 1

Sabkha Bus Station · 1 is a crucial transport hub located in the heart of Dubai, catering to a diverse range of passengers. This bus station is strategically positioned to provide easy access to various city areas and essential services. It features amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates to ensure a comfortable and efficient travel experience. Its central location makes it an important transit point for commuters navigating through the bustling cityscape of Dubai.

British Council Bus Stop Intersection

This strategic location offers passengers seamless connections across different routes, enhancing the overall convenience and efficiency of travel in the area. The bus stop’s integration with these routes ensures accessible and well-connected options for both daily commuters and occasional travelers.

l Warsan 1, Eppco 1 Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Warsan 1, Eppco 1 Bus Stop is a key junction where Routes 50, X23, 310, and E16 intersect. This bus stop serves as a vital hub for commuters traveling to and from the Al Warsan area, offering diverse route options that connect to various parts of the city. The intersection of these routes ensures convenient and efficient transit, making it an essential stop for daily travelers and residents.

Hatta Bus Station · 1

Its location supports seamless travel between Hatta and other parts of Dubai, providing essential connectivity for residents and visitors exploring the more remote areas of the emirate.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The E16 bus route covers several notable tourist attractions and destinations. Here are some highlights along the way: 1.

  1. Emirates NBD: While primarily a banking institution, its presence in central locations often places it near other attractions in Dubai.

  2. Dubai Intercontinental Hotel: A luxurious hotel providing high-end accommodation and dining options, popular among travelers seeking premium experiences.

  3. British Council: An important cultural institution that offers various events and activities related to arts and education.

  4. Oud Metha Metro · 1: This area is close to Wafi City, a renowned shopping and entertainment complex with a distinctive Egyptian theme.

  5. Wafi City: A major shopping and entertainment destination featuring a range of retail outlets, restaurants, and entertainment options.

  6. Dragon Mart 2 External: A large shopping complex known for its diverse range of products, from electronics to textiles, popular among shoppers looking for variety.

  7. Civil Defence Training Centre: While not a traditional tourist spot, the centre’s architecture and the area’s development contribute to Dubai’s modern infrastructure.

  8. Ramool Adventure Park: Offers recreational and leisure activities, providing a family-friendly destination for fun and relaxation.

10.

These stops offer a mix of cultural, shopping, and recreational experiences, making the E16 bus route a convenient way to explore some of Dubai’s diverse attractions.

Journey Experience

The route passes through various urban and suburban areas, showcasing the vibrant mix of Dubai’s city life before transitioning into the more serene desert landscapes.

As you approach Hatta, the stunning Hajar Mountains come into view, offering a picturesque backdrop. Hatta is known for its outdoor activities such as hiking and the famous Hatta Dam, making this route not only practical but also a perfect gateway to explore the natural beauty and adventure spots in the region.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Hatta Bus Station, 1, the furthest point on the E16 bus route, starting from Sabkha Bus Station · 1. The journey offers a scenic ride through Dubai and its surroundings, with a price range of AED 317-387, depending on the exact distance and traffic conditions. This convenience allows you to explore the picturesque Hatta area comfortably, ensuring a smooth transition between Dubai’s bustling cityscape and the serene landscapes of Hatta.

This comprehensive guide to the E16 bus route provides essential information for travelers looking to navigate between Sabkha and Hatta, ensuring a smooth and well-informed journey. By detailing service descriptions, route stops, timings, and ticket pricing, passengers can plan their trips efficiently and with confidence. Additionally, understanding the available booking options and fare structure helps in making travel more convenient and budget-friendly.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 6, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
